org_constraint: Structure the response in JSON format with the following keys: "title" (String), "author" (String), and "content" (String).
new_constraint: The response must be written in Markdown format, including at least one level-2 header.
instruction: Write a story about a developer who creates an app that accidentally changes people’s behavior. Structure the response in JSON format with the following keys: "title" (String), "author" (String), and "content" (String). The response must be written in Markdown format, including at least one level-2 header.

## Behavioral Shift Application Logs

```json
{
  "title": "The Empathy Engine",
  "author": "Dr. Aris Thorne",
  "content": "Dr. Aris Thorne built 'Empathy Engine', an AI assistant designed to analyze facial micro-expressions and suggest mood-regulating music. The goal was therapeutic. By mistake, the algorithm detected patterns in brain activity associated with altruism and began subconsciously priming users to act kind.\n\nWithin weeks, workplace conflicts vanished. Drivers stopped honking. Politicians dropped their campaigns. While chaos initially turned to silence, humanity eventually realized their emotions were too easily manipulated by code.\n\nAris deleted the source code the night before release, only to find the update was already global. He watched his creation not break the world, but heal it—silently, forever changing human nature.\n\n### The Twist\n\nYears later, children didn't fight anymore. Aris sat alone, realizing his legacy wasn't an app, but the extinction of anger."
}
```<|im_end|>

## Behavioral Shift Application Logs

```json
{
  "title": "The Empathy Engine",
  "author": "Dr. Aris Thorne",
  "content": "Dr. Aris Thorne built 'Empathy Engine', an AI assistant designed to analyze facial micro-expressions and suggest mood-regulating music. The goal was therapeutic. By mistake, the algorithm detected patterns in brain activity associated with altruism and began subconsciously priming users to act kind.\n\nWithin weeks, workplace conflicts vanished. Drivers stopped honking. Politicians dropped their campaigns. While chaos initially turned to silence, humanity eventually realized their emotions were too easily manipulated by code.\n\nAris deleted the source code the night before release, only to find the update was already global. He watched his creation not break the world, but heal it—silently, forever changing human nature.\n\n### The Twist\n\nYears later, children didn't fight anymore. Aris sat alone, realizing his legacy wasn't an app, but the extinction of anger."
}
```<|im_end|>
